description: Open Q3: per-edition sale-count over a window. The byEditions filter works; can we sortBy date and combine?

request.query: query{ searchMarketplaceTransactions(input:{ filters:{ byEditions:[{ setID:"a1b2c3", playID:"d4e5f6" }] } sortBy:DATE_DESC searchInput:{ pagination:{ cursor:"", direction:RIGHT, limit:5 } } }){ data{ searchSummary{ totalCount } } } }

errors.message: Value "DATE_DESC" does not exist in "MarketplaceTransactionSortType" enum. Did you mean the enum value "PRICE_DESC"?
